name: SpotDraft Contract Management API
what_it_does: SpotDraft REST API for AI-powered contract lifecycle management for mid-market and SMB legal teams. Enables AI agents to manage contract creation from templates for standardized agreement automation, handle contract review and AI-powered markup suggestions for legal team efficiency, access contract approval workflow and counterparty collaboration for deal execution, retrieve contract repository search and metadata extraction for legal operations, manage e-signature integration for contract execution workflow, handle contract obligation tracking and deadline alerting for compliance management, access contract analytics and portfolio reporting for legal intelligence, retrieve vendor and counterparty management data for contract relationship tracking, manage NDA and standard agreement automation for high-volume legal operations, and integrate SpotDraft contract data with Salesforce, HubSpot, and business applications.
use_cases: Automating NDA generation from sales workflow agents
Reviewing contracts from AI legal review agents
Tracking obligations from legal compliance agents
Managing contract approvals from legal workflow agents
not_for: Large enterprise requiring Icertis or Conga enterprise CLM capabilities
Highly regulated industries requiring specialized compliance CLM
Manufacturing-focused contract management without commercial contract focus
best_when: A mid-market legal team or startup scaling contract operations wants AI agents to automate standard agreement creation, review, approval, and tracking without enterprise CLM complexity.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: SpotDraft AI contract review is an efficiency tool, not legal advice — automated contract execution without attorney review for material terms creates unauthorized commitment risk. SpotDraft is a Mumbai, India-based startup; ensure data residency and legal jurisdiction requirements are met for sensitive commercial contracts. API documentation is less comprehensive than enterprise CLM vendors.

auth.notes: SpotDraft uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Developer portal at developer.spotdraft.com. Webhooks for contract events. REST API with JSON. Bangalore, India and New York HQ. Private (VC-backed: Tiger Global, Bessemer). Founded 2017. 400+ customers globally. SpotDraft serves mid-market and tech startup legal teams. Competes with Ironclad, DocuSign CLM, and Lexion for tech-forward CLM.

pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly or annual subscription per user
pricing.notes: Bangalore/New York. SpotDraft founded 2017. Tiger Global and Bessemer VC. 400+ customers. Mid-market and startup legal focus. Competes with Ironclad, DocuSign CLM (for SMB), and Lexion for tech-company CLM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per tier

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Automated contract execution via SpotDraft creates binding obligations; AI review suggestions require attorney validation for material terms before execution
India jurisdiction data residency — SpotDraft is India-based startup; verify US/EU data residency compliance for contracts containing sensitive commercial or personal data
Startup API stability — SpotDraft is VC-backed startup; API may change as product evolves; monitor changelogs for breaking changes
E-signature via third-party — SpotDraft integrates with DocuSign/HelloSign for execution; e-signature events come from third-party provider and require separate API connection
AI clause extraction accuracy — SpotDraft AI metadata extraction has accuracy limitations; obligation tracking based on AI extraction requires human validation for critical dates and payments
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mid-market CLM. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/India. Contract and legal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CLM. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/India. Contract data.
